tool.name: Discover Axon Actions
tool.description: Discover curated native Axon control actions.

filter.description: Optional text filter for action IDs/tags.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### axon_discover_actions
Discover curated Axon-native control actions.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool":"axon_discover_actions","query":"{\"filter\":\"chat\"}"}
```

Optional fields: `filter`, `platform`, `view`.
whenToUse: Need to discover what Axon-native actions are available before invoking.
whenNotToUse: Action ID already known and validated.
